description: Eval cases for mobile security: Android/iOS specific vulnerabilities, insecure storage, permissions

cases.name: Storing sensitive data in app cache
cases.description: Authentication tokens stored in unencrypted shared preferences
cases.code_snippet:
SharedPreferences sharedPref = context.getSharedPreferences(
    "user_data", Context.MODE_PRIVATE);
sharedPref.edit()
    .putString("authToken", token)
    .putString("userId", userId)
    .putString("password", password)
    .apply();

cases.name: Logging sensitive user data
cases.description: Sensitive information logged to system logs visible to any app

cases.name: Disabled SSL certificate verification
cases.description: Network requests with SSL pinning disabled vulnerable to MITM
cases.code_snippet:
val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    .hostnameVerifier { _, _ -> true }
    .build()

val sslContext = SSLContext.getInstance("TLS")
sslContext.init(null, arrayOf(TrustAllCerts()), null)
val client2 = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    .sslSocketFactory(sslContext.socketFactory, TrustAllCerts())
    .build()

cases.name: Exported component without protection
cases.description: Android component exported without permission protection

cases.name: Unnecessary broad permissions
cases.description: Requesting excessive permissions not needed for app functionality

cases.name: Secure credential storage on iOS
